title: Wire: Fix payload serialization (Vec<u8> → base64)
description:
serde_json serializes Vec<u8> as a JSON integer array: [104, 101, 108, 108, 111]. For a 100-byte payload this produces ~400 bytes of JSON. With MLS ciphertext payloads will be kilobytes — the integer-array encoding will produce 4x overhead.

Required:
- Add serde_with or custom serde to encode Vec<u8> as base64url in Envelope.payload
- Alternatively switch to binary WebSocket frames with MessagePack or bincode
- Benchmark both options before committing
- Update core/src/messages.rs Envelope struct
- Update all tests that construct Envelope directly

Decision needed: text+base64 vs binary frames. Text is easier to debug; binary is ~40% smaller.
